channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Voxmeter for Ritzau, 11–13 March 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
8 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Voxmeter for Ritzau, 11–13 March 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/danish_ep_polls/2026-03-13-Voxmeter.html
